title: CarPlan LVC150 Car Leather Valet Interior Cleaner Conditioner Restorer 150gm (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
GENTLY CLEANS & RESTORES: A blend of soaps, natural oils, and waxes effectively cleans and nourishes leather.
PREVENTS PREMATURE AGEING: Replenishes natural oils to keep leather soft, supple, and long-lasting.
LUXURIOUS LEATHER AROMA: Leaves a rich, classic leather scent on treated surfaces.
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: Ideal for car interiors, home furniture, and leisure vehicles like caravans and yachts.
DEEP CONDITIONING FORMULA: Cleans, feeds, and moisturizes leather to maintain its original beauty.
